title: Croatia Annual Personal Income Tax Declaration (Obrazac DOH)
description: The Porezna uprava's (Croatian Tax Administration) "PRIJAVA POREZA NA DOHODAK" (Income Tax Declaration), internally referenced as Obrazac DOH — the annual personal income tax return Croatian resident taxpayers file to declare income and reconcile advance tax paid during the year. Opens Croatia's Taxes vertical (the registry's 52nd jurisdiction). The source is a static, unauthenticated PDF distributed directly from Porezna uprava's own document host, with no AcroForm layer (confirmed via pdfjs-dist returning zero widget annotations across all 8 pages) — a hand-fill/print template, the same pattern as Poland's PIT-37 and Bulgaria's Обр. 2001, but fully self-documenting via its own printed section numbers and column headers. Mirroring the PIT-37 precedent, this v1.0.0 deliberately scopes to the most common salaried-employee/pensioner case rather than modelling the whole form. It models in full: the form's header (tax year, filing tax office/branch), Section 1 (general identification — name, address, contact details, OIB, the assisted-area/Vukovar residency flag, bank account, and authorized representative/tax advisor identification), Section 2 (dependent family members, a bounded repeating group capped at 3 of the paper form's own 7 numbered rows), Section 3 (personal deduction increase for domestic health-insurance contributions and donations), Section 4.1.1 (domestic employment wages earned outside assisted areas, a bounded repeating group of employer/payer rows capped at 3 of the paper form's own 6 numbered rows, plus its UKUPNO total), Section 4.1.5 (domestic pension income, structured identically to 4.1.1 and capped the same way), Section 6 (the flat 9-row table of tax reliefs/exemptions/incentives), Section 7 (free-text list of attached documents), and Section 8 (taxpayer's notes and the closing signature declaration). It deliberately does NOT model: Section 1.5 (the multi-period residence/habitual-abode table, relevant only to taxpayers who changed their municipality or country of residence during the year) and Section 1.6 (the HRVI war-disabled-veteran disability-status table), both narrow pathways outside the common salaried-employee/pensioner case; Sections 4.1.2/4.1.3/4.1.4 (wages earned in assisted areas/Vukovar, or abroad) and 4.1.6 (foreign pension income); Section 4.1.7 (the computed total employment+pension income/tax figure, chained off the unmodelled foreign-income rows) and 4.1.8 (HRVI-exempt employment/pension income); Section 4.2 (other income — board-member fees, copyright/royalties, artist/sportsperson income, sales-agent commissions, prizes/scholarships, student work, and journalist/athlete honoraria); Section 4.3 (income from self-employment/crafts/freelance/agriculture — by far the form's most complex section, with its own current-year/loss, foreign-income, carried-forward-loss, and social-contribution sub-calculations); and Section 5 (the grand-total income/tax figure, which sums across the unmodelled 4.2 and 4.3 sections and so cannot be correctly derived from this schema's field set alone). See VERIFICATION.md for the full scope rationale, every disclosed judgment call, and the candidate-comparison record for Croatia's other five verticals. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Croatia or the Porezna uprava.

operatedBy.name: Ministarstvo financija
operatedBy.basis: Zakon o porezu na dohodak (Narodne novine 115/16, 106/18, 121/19, 32/20, 138/20, 151/22, 114/23), which establishes personal income tax and the obligation to file an annual return, and its implementing Pravilnik o porezu na dohodak (Narodne novine 10/17, as subsequently amended through 143/23), which prescribes return procedures and forms. The Obrazac DOH PDF itself prints no explicit 'pravna osnova' citation line (unlike some peer registry sources); this basis is drawn from independent research into the governing legislation rather than the form's own text — see VERIFICATION.md.

source.documentRef: Obrazac DOH — Prijava poreza na dohodak (Income Tax Declaration)

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle (GOV-2883). Opens Croatia as the registry's 52nd jurisdiction via the Taxes vertical. Obrazac DOH, Porezna uprava's annual personal income tax declaration, was independently re-fetched this cycle directly from porezna-uprava.gov.hr (HTTP 200, application/pdf, 271,486 bytes, sha256 506fdc3469a457a60bdd71f924c379d7daf10a4ab2f2d5f83068b08b548c152c) and independently re-extracted with pdfjs-dist (legacy/build/pdf.js): 8 pages, zero Widget annotations on every page (a static hand-fill/print template, not a fillable AcroForm), full printed section/column text captured via getTextContent(). This cycle also screened Croatia's other five verticals (DMV, Business Formation, Visa, Passport, National ID & Civic Documents) — see the 'Candidates screened' section of VERIFICATION.md for the full record and URLs. Summary: Business Formation (obrt/craft-business registration, portor.gov.hr) is a strong, genuine, unauthenticated .doc download, not authored this cycle and left as open backlog; Visa (MVEP's long-term Type D visa application) is a genuine unauthenticated PDF but field-for-field matches the already-modelled EU-harmonized long-stay-visa template (duplicate, not authored); DMV (both vozačka dozvola/driving-licence issuance and vehicle registration/tehnički pregled), Passport, and National ID (osobna iskaznica) are all dead ends for this cycle — Croatia's MUP civil-document processes are officer-mediated at the counter, printing the application from civil-registry data rather than distributing a blank public template.

fields.name: taxYear
fields.label: Prijava poreza na dohodak za ______ godinu
fields.description: The tax year this annual income tax declaration covers, printed in the form's own header blank.

fields.name: taxOfficeAndBranch
fields.label: Područni ured ___ Ispostava ___
fields.description: The regional tax office (područni ured) and its branch office (ispostava) with jurisdiction over the taxpayer, where this declaration is filed.

fields.name: fullNameAndParentName
fields.label: 1.1. Ime i prezime / ime roditelja
fields.description: The taxpayer's full name and their parent's given name (a Croatian civil-registry convention used to disambiguate taxpayers who share a name).

fields.name: residentialAddress
fields.label: 1.2. Adresa (mjesto, ulica i kućni broj)
fields.description: The taxpayer's current address: place, street, and house number.

fields.name: phone
fields.label: 1.2.1. Telefon
fields.description: Optional phone number to help the tax office reach the taxpayer about this return.

fields.name: email
fields.label: 1.2.2. Adresa elektroničke pošte
fields.description: Optional email address to help the tax office reach the taxpayer about this return.

fields.name: oib
fields.label: 1.3. OIB
fields.description: The taxpayer's OIB (Osobni identifikacijski broj), Croatia's 11-digit personal identification number.

fields.name: assistedAreaOrVukovarResident
fields.label: 1.4. Potpomognuta područja i područje Grada Vukovara (zaokružiti): DA/NE
fields.description: Whether the taxpayer resided during the tax year in an area classified as 'assisted' (a group-I municipality under the special regional-development regulation) or in the City of Vukovar — a status that gates certain tax reliefs modelled in Section 6 below.

fields.name: bankAccountNumber
fields.label: 1.7. Broj računa
fields.description: The taxpayer's bank account number, used e.g. for routing a refund.

fields.name: bankNameAndSeat
fields.label: 1.7. Otvoren u (naziv i sjedište)
fields.description: Name and registered seat of the bank where the account in bankAccountNumber is held.

fields.name: representativeName
fields.label: 1.8.1. Naziv / ime i prezime (opunomoćenik/porezni savjetnik)
fields.description: Name of the authorized representative or tax advisor filing on the taxpayer's behalf, if any.

fields.name: representativeAddress
fields.label: 1.8.2. Adresa sjedišta / prebivališta / boravišta
fields.description: Address (registered seat, permanent, or temporary residence) of the representative/tax advisor named in representativeName.

fields.name: representativeOib
fields.label: 1.8.3. OIB
fields.description: OIB of the representative/tax advisor named in representativeName.

fields.name: dependent1FullName
fields.label: 2. Uzdržavani član uže obitelji 1 — ime i prezime
fields.description: Full name of dependent family member 1 (row 1 of the paper form's uzdržavani članovi table, capped at 3 of the form's own 7 numbered rows — see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: dependent1Relationship
fields.label: 2. Uzdržavani član uže obitelji 1 — srodstvo
fields.description: Relationship of dependent 1 to the taxpayer (e.g. child, spouse, parent).

fields.name: dependent1Oib
fields.label: 2. Uzdržavani član uže obitelji 1 — OIB
fields.description: OIB of dependent 1.

fields.name: dependent1DisabilityMarking
fields.label: 2. Uzdržavani član uže obitelji 1 — invalid (I ili I*)
fields.description: Disability marking for dependent 1, when applicable: 'I' (invalid) or 'I*' (100% invalidity, or entitlement to assistance/care due to disability, or to the inclusive supplement). Left absent when the dependent has no disability marking.

fields.name: dependent1PeriodFrom
fields.label: 2. Uzdržavani član uže obitelji 1 — razdoblje korištenja od
fields.description: Start date of the period during the tax year this dependent was claimed for dependent 1.

fields.name: dependent1PeriodTo
fields.label: 2. Uzdržavani član uže obitelji 1 — razdoblje korištenja do
fields.description: End date of the period during the tax year this dependent was claimed for dependent 1.

fields.name: dependent1PersonalDeductionSharedWithOib
fields.label: 2. Uzdržavani član uže obitelji 1 — osobni odbitak dijeli se s osobom OIB
fields.description: OIB of the other person the personal deduction for dependent 1 is split with, when the deduction is shared between two taxpayers (e.g. divorced parents).

fields.name: dependent1PersonalDeductionSharePercentage
fields.label: 2. Uzdržavani član uže obitelji 1 — postotak osobnog odbitka
fields.description: Percentage of the personal deduction for dependent 1 claimed by this taxpayer, when split with another person.

fields.name: dependent2FullName
fields.label: 2. Uzdržavani član uže obitelji 2 — ime i prezime
fields.description: Full name of dependent family member 2 (row 2 of the paper form's uzdržavani članovi table, capped at 3 of the form's own 7 numbered rows — see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: dependent2Relationship
fields.label: 2. Uzdržavani član uže obitelji 2 — srodstvo
fields.description: Relationship of dependent 2 to the taxpayer (e.g. child, spouse, parent).

fields.name: dependent2Oib
fields.label: 2. Uzdržavani član uže obitelji 2 — OIB
fields.description: OIB of dependent 2.

fields.name: dependent2DisabilityMarking
fields.label: 2. Uzdržavani član uže obitelji 2 — invalid (I ili I*)
fields.description: Disability marking for dependent 2, when applicable: 'I' (invalid) or 'I*' (100% invalidity, or entitlement to assistance/care due to disability, or to the inclusive supplement). Left absent when the dependent has no disability marking.

fields.name: dependent2PeriodFrom
fields.label: 2. Uzdržavani član uže obitelji 2 — razdoblje korištenja od
fields.description: Start date of the period during the tax year this dependent was claimed for dependent 2.

fields.name: dependent2PeriodTo
fields.label: 2. Uzdržavani član uže obitelji 2 — razdoblje korištenja do
fields.description: End date of the period during the tax year this dependent was claimed for dependent 2.

fields.name: dependent2PersonalDeductionSharedWithOib
fields.label: 2. Uzdržavani član uže obitelji 2 — osobni odbitak dijeli se s osobom OIB
fields.description: OIB of the other person the personal deduction for dependent 2 is split with, when the deduction is shared between two taxpayers (e.g. divorced parents).

fields.name: dependent2PersonalDeductionSharePercentage
fields.label: 2. Uzdržavani član uže obitelji 2 — postotak osobnog odbitka
fields.description: Percentage of the personal deduction for dependent 2 claimed by this taxpayer, when split with another person.

fields.name: dependent3FullName
fields.label: 2. Uzdržavani član uže obitelji 3 — ime i prezime
fields.description: Full name of dependent family member 3 (row 3 of the paper form's uzdržavani članovi table, capped at 3 of the form's own 7 numbered rows — see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: dependent3Relationship
fields.label: 2. Uzdržavani član uže obitelji 3 — srodstvo
fields.description: Relationship of dependent 3 to the taxpayer (e.g. child, spouse, parent).

fields.name: dependent3Oib
fields.label: 2. Uzdržavani član uže obitelji 3 — OIB
fields.description: OIB of dependent 3.

fields.name: dependent3DisabilityMarking
fields.label: 2. Uzdržavani član uže obitelji 3 — invalid (I ili I*)
fields.description: Disability marking for dependent 3, when applicable: 'I' (invalid) or 'I*' (100% invalidity, or entitlement to assistance/care due to disability, or to the inclusive supplement). Left absent when the dependent has no disability marking.

fields.name: dependent3PeriodFrom
fields.label: 2. Uzdržavani član uže obitelji 3 — razdoblje korištenja od
fields.description: Start date of the period during the tax year this dependent was claimed for dependent 3.

fields.name: dependent3PeriodTo
fields.label: 2. Uzdržavani član uže obitelji 3 — razdoblje korištenja do
fields.description: End date of the period during the tax year this dependent was claimed for dependent 3.

fields.name: dependent3PersonalDeductionSharedWithOib
fields.label: 2. Uzdržavani član uže obitelji 3 — osobni odbitak dijeli se s osobom OIB
fields.description: OIB of the other person the personal deduction for dependent 3 is split with, when the deduction is shared between two taxpayers (e.g. divorced parents).

fields.name: dependent3PersonalDeductionSharePercentage
fields.label: 2. Uzdržavani član uže obitelji 3 — postotak osobnog odbitka
fields.description: Percentage of the personal deduction for dependent 3 claimed by this taxpayer, when split with another person.

fields.name: healthInsuranceContributionsPaidDomestically
fields.label: 3.1. Plaćene doprinose za zdravstveno osiguranje u tuzemstvu
fields.description: Domestic health-insurance contributions paid during the tax year, in EUR, that increase the taxpayer's personal deduction.

fields.name: donationsGiven
fields.label: 3.2. Dana darovanja
fields.description: Donations given during the tax year, in EUR, that increase the taxpayer's personal deduction.

fields.name: increasedPersonalDeductionTotal
fields.label: 3.3. Ukupno (3.1.+3.2.)
fields.description: Total increase to the personal deduction: healthInsuranceContributionsPaidDomestically plus donationsGiven. This schema captures the value as declared and does not itself enforce the arithmetic relationship.

fields.name: employer1Oib
fields.label: 4.1.1. Poslodavac 1 — OIB poslodavca/isplatitelja
fields.description: OIB of employer/payer 1 for domestic wage income earned outside assisted areas and the City of Vukovar (row 1 of §4.1.1, capped at 3 of the form's own 6 numbered rows — see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: employer1GrossReceipts
fields.label: 4.1.1. Poslodavac 1 — ukupni iznos primitka
fields.description: Total gross receipts (wages) from employer 1, in EUR.

fields.name: employer1MandatoryContributions
fields.label: 4.1.1. Poslodavac 1 — obvezni doprinosi iz plaće
fields.description: Mandatory contributions withheld from wages paid by employer 1, in EUR.

fields.name: employer1Income
fields.label: 4.1.1. Poslodavac 1 — dohodak
fields.description: Taxable income from employer 1 (gross receipts minus mandatory contributions). This schema captures the value as declared and does not itself enforce the arithmetic relationship.

fields.name: employer1TaxPaid
fields.label: 4.1.1. Poslodavac 1 — uplaćeni porez
fields.description: Advance income tax already paid on wages from employer 1, in EUR.

fields.name: employer2Oib
fields.label: 4.1.1. Poslodavac 2 — OIB poslodavca/isplatitelja
fields.description: OIB of employer/payer 2 for domestic wage income earned outside assisted areas and the City of Vukovar (row 2 of §4.1.1, capped at 3 of the form's own 6 numbered rows — see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: employer2GrossReceipts
fields.label: 4.1.1. Poslodavac 2 — ukupni iznos primitka
fields.description: Total gross receipts (wages) from employer 2, in EUR.

fields.name: employer2MandatoryContributions
fields.label: 4.1.1. Poslodavac 2 — obvezni doprinosi iz plaće
fields.description: Mandatory contributions withheld from wages paid by employer 2, in EUR.

fields.name: employer2Income
fields.label: 4.1.1. Poslodavac 2 — dohodak
fields.description: Taxable income from employer 2 (gross receipts minus mandatory contributions). This schema captures the value as declared and does not itself enforce the arithmetic relationship.

fields.name: employer2TaxPaid
fields.label: 4.1.1. Poslodavac 2 — uplaćeni porez
fields.description: Advance income tax already paid on wages from employer 2, in EUR.

fields.name: employer3Oib
fields.label: 4.1.1. Poslodavac 3 — OIB poslodavca/isplatitelja
fields.description: OIB of employer/payer 3 for domestic wage income earned outside assisted areas and the City of Vukovar (row 3 of §4.1.1, capped at 3 of the form's own 6 numbered rows — see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: employer3GrossReceipts
fields.label: 4.1.1. Poslodavac 3 — ukupni iznos primitka
fields.description: Total gross receipts (wages) from employer 3, in EUR.

fields.name: employer3MandatoryContributions
fields.label: 4.1.1. Poslodavac 3 — obvezni doprinosi iz plaće
fields.description: Mandatory contributions withheld from wages paid by employer 3, in EUR.

fields.name: employer3Income
fields.label: 4.1.1. Poslodavac 3 — dohodak
fields.description: Taxable income from employer 3 (gross receipts minus mandatory contributions). This schema captures the value as declared and does not itself enforce the arithmetic relationship.

fields.name: employer3TaxPaid
fields.label: 4.1.1. Poslodavac 3 — uplaćeni porez
fields.description: Advance income tax already paid on wages from employer 3, in EUR.

fields.name: totalDomesticEmploymentIncome
fields.label: 4.1.1. Ukupno — dohodak
fields.description: UKUPNO 4.1.1.: total taxable income across all domestic employer/payer rows in §4.1.1. This schema captures the value as declared.

fields.name: totalDomesticEmploymentTaxPaid
fields.label: 4.1.1. Ukupno — uplaćeni porez
fields.description: UKUPNO 4.1.1.: total advance tax paid across all domestic employer/payer rows in §4.1.1.

fields.name: pensionPayer1Oib
fields.label: 4.1.5. Isplatitelj mirovine 1 — OIB isplatitelja
fields.description: OIB of pension payer 1 for domestic pension income (row 1 of §4.1.5, capped at 3 of the form's own 6 numbered rows — see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: pensionPayer1GrossAmount
fields.label: 4.1.5. Isplatitelj mirovine 1 — ukupni iznos mirovine
fields.description: Total gross pension amount paid by pension payer 1, in EUR.

fields.name: pensionPayer1MandatoryContributions
fields.label: 4.1.5. Isplatitelj mirovine 1 — obvezni doprinosi iz mirovine
fields.description: Mandatory contributions withheld from the pension paid by pension payer 1, in EUR.

fields.name: pensionPayer1Income
fields.label: 4.1.5. Isplatitelj mirovine 1 — dohodak
fields.description: Taxable pension income from pension payer 1 (gross amount minus mandatory contributions). This schema captures the value as declared and does not itself enforce the arithmetic relationship.

fields.name: pensionPayer1TaxPaid
fields.label: 4.1.5. Isplatitelj mirovine 1 — uplaćeni porez
fields.description: Advance income tax already paid on the pension from pension payer 1, in EUR.

fields.name: pensionPayer2Oib
fields.label: 4.1.5. Isplatitelj mirovine 2 — OIB isplatitelja
fields.description: OIB of pension payer 2 for domestic pension income (row 2 of §4.1.5, capped at 3 of the form's own 6 numbered rows — see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: pensionPayer2GrossAmount
fields.label: 4.1.5. Isplatitelj mirovine 2 — ukupni iznos mirovine
fields.description: Total gross pension amount paid by pension payer 2, in EUR.

fields.name: pensionPayer2MandatoryContributions
fields.label: 4.1.5. Isplatitelj mirovine 2 — obvezni doprinosi iz mirovine
fields.description: Mandatory contributions withheld from the pension paid by pension payer 2, in EUR.

fields.name: pensionPayer2Income
fields.label: 4.1.5. Isplatitelj mirovine 2 — dohodak
fields.description: Taxable pension income from pension payer 2 (gross amount minus mandatory contributions). This schema captures the value as declared and does not itself enforce the arithmetic relationship.

fields.name: pensionPayer2TaxPaid
fields.label: 4.1.5. Isplatitelj mirovine 2 — uplaćeni porez
fields.description: Advance income tax already paid on the pension from pension payer 2, in EUR.

fields.name: pensionPayer3Oib
fields.label: 4.1.5. Isplatitelj mirovine 3 — OIB isplatitelja
fields.description: OIB of pension payer 3 for domestic pension income (row 3 of §4.1.5, capped at 3 of the form's own 6 numbered rows — see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: pensionPayer3GrossAmount
fields.label: 4.1.5. Isplatitelj mirovine 3 — ukupni iznos mirovine
fields.description: Total gross pension amount paid by pension payer 3, in EUR.

fields.name: pensionPayer3MandatoryContributions
fields.label: 4.1.5. Isplatitelj mirovine 3 — obvezni doprinosi iz mirovine
fields.description: Mandatory contributions withheld from the pension paid by pension payer 3, in EUR.

fields.name: totalDomesticPensionIncome
fields.label: 4.1.5. Ukupno — dohodak
fields.description: UKUPNO 4.1.5.: total taxable pension income across all domestic pension-payer rows in §4.1.5. This schema captures the value as declared.

fields.name: totalDomesticPensionTaxPaid
fields.label: 4.1.5. Ukupno — uplaćeni porez
fields.description: UKUPNO 4.1.5.: total advance tax paid across all domestic pension-payer rows in §4.1.5.

fields.name: reliefTaxExemptArtistIncome
fields.label: 6. 1. Neoporezivi primici umjetnika
fields.description: Tax-exempt receipts of independent artists, per čl. 20. Zakona o pravima samostalnih umjetnika i poticanju kulturnog i umjetničkog stvaralaštva.

fields.name: reliefTaxExemptArtisticHonorarium
fields.label: 6. 2. Neoporezivi dio umjetničkog honorara
fields.description: Tax-exempt portion of an artistic honorarium, per čl. 22. Zakona o pravima samostalnih umjetnika i poticanju kulturnog i umjetničkog stvaralaštva.

fields.name: reliefRepresentationCosts
fields.label: 6. 3. Porezno priznati izdaci reprezentacije
fields.description: Tax-recognized representation costs, per čl. 33. st.1. t.1. Zakona o porezu na dohodak.

fields.name: reliefPensionersAndAssistedAreaResidents
fields.label: 6. 4. Umanjenje poreza za umirovljenike i osobe koje borave na potpomognutim područjima i području Grada Vukovara
fields.description: Tax reduction for pensioners and for residents of assisted areas/the City of Vukovar, per čl. 46. st.1. Zakona o porezu na dohodak.

fields.name: reliefHrvi
fields.label: 6. 5. Umanjenje poreza za olakšicu HRVI
fields.description: Tax reduction for Croatian war-disabled veterans (HRVI), per čl. 42. st.1. Zakona o porezu na dohodak.

fields.name: reliefAssistedAreasAndVukovar
fields.label: 6. 6. Umanjenje poreza za olakšice na potpomognutim područjima i području Grada Vukovara
fields.description: Tax reduction for assisted areas and the City of Vukovar, per čl. 43. Zakona o porezu na dohodak.

fields.name: reliefUnder25
fields.label: 6. 7. Umanjenje poreza fizičkim osobama do 25 godina života
fields.description: Tax reduction for individuals under 25 years of age, per čl. 46. st.2. Zakona o porezu na dohodak.

fields.name: relief26To30
fields.label: 6. 8. Umanjenje poreza fizičkim osobama od 26 do 30 godina života
fields.description: Tax reduction for individuals aged 26 to 30, per čl. 46. st.2. Zakona o porezu na dohodak.

fields.name: reliefCroatianEmigrants
fields.label: 6. 9. Umanjenje za hrvatske iseljenike u prekomorske i europske države
fields.description: Tax reduction for Croatian emigrants to overseas and European countries, per čl. 46. st.3. i 4. Zakona o porezu na dohodak.

fields.name: listOfAttachedDocuments
fields.label: 7. Popis priloženih isprava
fields.description: Free-text list of the supporting documents the taxpayer attaches to this declaration. The paper form provides blank lines rather than a predefined checklist.

fields.name: taxpayerNotes
fields.label: 8. Napomene poreznog obveznika / opunomoćenika / poreznog savjetnika
fields.description: Optional free-text notes from the taxpayer, representative, or tax advisor.

fields.name: declarationDate
fields.label: Nadnevak
fields.description: Date the declaration is signed. The form itself splits this into day/month/year boxes; modelled here as one ISO 8601 date, consistent with this registry's convention elsewhere.

documents.label: Taxpayer's closing signature declaration
documents.statement: ZA ISTINITOST I VJERODOSTOJNOST PODATAKA JAMČIM VLASTITIM POTPISOM
